content_type: photo graphic with title and embedded post
description: A composite graphic. The upper portion is a color photograph of Donald Trump (dark suit, red tie) standing beside Chinese President Xi Jinping (dark suit) facing cameras under a modern glass-and-metal canopy, flanked by aides, security, and an American flag at left. Overlaid across the photo in large white serif type is the title 'Trip to China'. Below is an inset styled as a screenshot of a Donald J. Trump X/Truth Social post (flag avatar, verified badge, '@realDonaldTrump') reading, with the opening phrase highlighted in yellow: 'I am very much looking forward to my trip to China, an amazing Country, with a Leader, President Xi, respected by all. Great things will happen for both Countries! President DONALD J. TRUMP'. At the bottom is the White House engraving and 'The WHITE HOUSE' wordmark.
notable_text: Trip to China / I am very much looking forward to my trip to China, an amazing Country, with a Leader, President Xi, respected by all. Great things will happen for both Countries! President DONALD J. TRUMP
